slurmClusterManager.autoRefreshEnabled.description: Enable auto refresh of job lists

slurmClusterManager.confirmCancelJob.description: Show confirmation dialog before cancelling a job

slurmClusterManager.mockMode.description: Use local mock Slurm data for extension development without requiring Slurm commands

slurmClusterManager.leaderboardTopUserCo.description: Number of top GPU users to show in the Hall of Shame. Your own row is still shown when it falls outside this count.

slurmClusterManager.submitDependencyBeha.description: Whether to prompt for job dependencies when submitting a job (e.g. via the play button)

slurmClusterManager.showResourceHogs.description: Whether to fetch and display the Job Hog and GPU Gobbler stats at the top of the active jobs list.
